description: Narvar provides post-purchase retail software for shipment tracking, notifications, returns and exchanges, delivery protection, and related fraud/risk workflows. Its products are used by retailers to power branded delivery and returns experiences after checkout.
summary: Narvar exposes a documented HTTP integration surface called the Narvar Order API, but its public documentation is mostly behind sign-in and does not publicly reveal a machine-readable spec, base URL, or definitive auth mechanics; public support docs also reference Hub-issued integration tokens used in the Zendesk Connect & Care app.
